classObjective: Determine the coordinates of the image of a point after a reflection in a horizontal or vertical line.
workedExamples: 13-1, Example 3 — Determine Coordinates After a Reflection in a Horizontal or Vertical Line
13-1, Example 4 — Apply Reflections to Real-World Problems (Banner, Sandbox)
warmUp: What is the reflection of (-3, 7) over the line y = 4?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: single point reflection; real-world reflection contexts (banners, mirrors, architecture)
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice determining coordinates after reflections in various lines
independentPractice: Practice problems finding coordinates of reflected points and applying to real-world scenarios
assessment: Exit ticket: find the coordinates of (5, -2) after reflection over the line y = -3
capReflection: How does understanding reflection help you solve real-world problems involving mirrors or symmetry?
